overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban construction site in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning under an elevated highway structure, observing passing traffic, proceeding through a covered construction corridor with extensive scaffolding, and emerging onto a sunlit city street lined with palm trees and modern commercial buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction site entrance under elevated highway

events.description: camera turns right toward the street to observe passing traffic
blue sports car drives past on the road from left to right
grey sedan drives past on the road from left to right

agents.ego_description: walking from under the construction structure toward the street to observe traffic, then turning to enter the construction walkway

notable_agents.action: construction worker standing near the green dumpster
security guard walking past the camera into the construction site

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway overpass with support pillars
extensive orange metal scaffolding structure along the building
traffic signal showing red light at the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens under a massive elevated highway structure with concrete pillars and orange scaffolding. The camera moves toward a street intersection where a blue sports car and grey sedan pass by. A security guard walks past the camera as it turns to enter a covered construction walkway.

events.description: passing construction workers visible in the distance working on the scaffolding
approaching the end of the covered corridor, increasing light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered construction corridor between scaffolding and concrete pillars

entered.detail: orange scaffolding structure now visible on the left side of the walkway
stacks of lumber and construction supplies piled along the right side
tall futuristic control tower visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a long covered walkway flanked by orange scaffolding on both sides. The space is sheltered under the highway structure with diffused lighting. Construction materials are stacked along the path, and a distant tower becomes visible at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban commercial street with palm trees

events.description: exits the covered construction corridor into open urban street with full sky visibility
green and red sports cars drive past on the adjacent city street

agents.ego_description: walking along the city sidewalk next to active traffic, passing palm trees and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving along the street from left to right

entered.detail: line of palm trees along the sidewalk edge
multi-story buildings with glass facades and commercial signage
active urban roadway with moving traffic
transit shelter structure on the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the construction corridor onto a sunlit urban street lined with palm trees. Modern commercial buildings with glass facades rise on the right while traffic flows along the road. The elevated highway structure recedes into the background as the camera continues along the city sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an industrial construction zone into the bright openness of a modern city street. It begins under a massive elevated highway structure amidst concrete pillars and orange scaffolding, passing a security guard and flowing traffic at a street intersection. As the camera turns, the environment shifts into a long, sheltered construction walkway where diffused light filters through flanking scaffolds and stacked materials. The scene then opens as the camera emerges from the corridor, transitioning abruptly from the dim underpass into brilliant sunlight. Finally, the view expands across a sidewalk lined with palm trees and glass-facade commercial buildings while the highway structure recedes into the background.
